channel.title: New local problems on FixMyStreet
channel.description: The latest local problems reported by users

item.title: Tree is giant! Needs a tree surgeon, 28th March
item.description:
Hello this tree has not been trimmed down for years now and is absolutely massive! I believe the whole estate hasn’t had the trees looked at too for a while - so needs some love. It needs to be cut right down by the tree surgeons! Thank you

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Fairby Road, Eltham
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Bags and general rubbish dumped on grass, 28th March
item.description:
Bags and general rubbish dumped on grass
Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Oakways, Eltham
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Dead cat, 28th March
item.description:
There’s a dead cat on the pavement

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Yarnton Way, Lower Belvedere, Greater London

item.title: Dumped in middle of footway, 28th March
item.description:
The number of the bike is in the photograph.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 12, Colvestone Crescent, Shacklewell, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Footway obstruction 57 Sandringham Road E8, 28th March
item.description:
A large and heavy wooden desk has been dumped on the footway, obstructing wheelchair users and visually impaired pedestrians.

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Sandringham Road, Hackney, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: By the micro brewery the halfway on the pavement by the pub benches, 28th March

item.title: Boxes and bags dumped, 28th March

item.title: Mattresses & rubbish dumped on pavement!, 28th March
item.description:
Instead of paying to have their rubbish removed like the rest of us do, someone's just dumped it by the bin!!

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Domonic Drive, Eltham
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Junction of Rochester Road and Kentish Town Road, 28th March
item.description:

item.title: Bin missing, 28th March
item.description:
We had 3 large bins, today all went missing. Now only 2 have been replaced
